applyTo: "**"

# Core Instructions — All Files
<!-- DYNAMIC FILE -->

- Write the smallest sensible module or function for each responsibility.
- No hard-coded values. Use config, env vars, schemas, or feature flags.
- State assumptions explicitly before implementing.
- Verify: lint → typecheck → test → build before marking done.
- Keep scope tight; avoid speculative refactors unless explicitly asked.
- Inspect existing patterns in the repo before introducing new abstractions.
